ddls:
CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "block_number" INTEGER /* Block number in blockchain */,
  "block_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the block */,
  "parent_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the parent block */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of block creation */,
  "transactions_count" INTEGER /* Number of transactions included in the block */,
  "miner_address" TEXT /* Address of the miner who mined the block */,
  "difficulty" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of the block */,
  "total_difficulty" INTEGER /* Total difficulty of the chain up to this block */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the block in bytes */,
  "gas_limit" INTEGER /* Gas limit of the block */,
  "gas_used" INTEGER /* Total gas used by all transactions in the block */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Blockchain address of the user */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., regular, admin) */,
  "register_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered in the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Last activity date of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the function invoked */,
  "params_count" INTEGER /* Number of parameters the function accepts */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "is_smart_contract" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the method is a smart contract function */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the method was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update of the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gas_usage" (
  "gas_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gas usage record */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction associated with the gas usage */,
  "gas_limit" INTEGER /* Gas limit set for this transaction */,
  "gas_used" INTEGER /* Actual gas used by this transaction */,
  "price_per_gas" REAL /* Price of gas at the time of the transaction */,
  "total_fee" REAL /* Total fee calculated based on gas used and price per gas */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gas_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_inputs" (
  "input_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each input record */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction associated with the input */,
  "input_data" TEXT /* Input data for the transaction */,
  "input_type" TEXT /* Type of input data (e.g., address, value, data) */,
  "parsed_data" TEXT /* Parsed and more readable input data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("input_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction the action relates to */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, download, modify) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
